description: Matrix runner configuration for cold, warm, and soak regime benchmarks

cold.description: Captures server launch and model load cost. Server must be restarted before cold runs.
cold.notes: If server is not restarted, results will actually be warm runs (state leakage).

warm.description: Normal interactive use with model already resident in memory.
warm.notes: Assumes prior requests have warmed the KV cache and model weights.

soak.description: Thermally-constrained sustained behavior after repeated requests.
soak.prompt_workload: Uses the single fixed soak prompt fixture only. Short, medium, and long prompt tiers must not execute under the soak regime.
soak.duration_policy: Represents the 15-minute sustained-load phase by repeating the fixed soak prompt. Do not change the soak duration without a DECISION_LOG.md entry.
soak.notes: Falling Decode TPS is expected due to thermal throttling. Ensure repetition_index and timestamp are recorded for thermal degradation analysis.

validation.expected_lines_formula: sum((1 if regime == 'soak' else selected_non_soak_prompt_count) * repetitions for regime in regimes)

risks.state_leakage: If cold run does not force server restart, it is actually a warm run.
risks.thermal_conflation: Soak regime falling TPS may be misinterpreted if repetition_index not tracked.
risks.silent_failures: If orchestration catches errors silently, results suffer survivorship bias.
risks.log_overwrites: Concurrent runs may overwrite raw_metrics.jsonl if output directories collide.
